articles.title: 6 easy ways: How to prevent AC from overheating and exploding
articles.description: Protect your home this summer by following these six essential AC safety steps. From using dedicated power sockets to ensuring your outdoor unit isn't clogged with dust, these simple maintenance hacks prevent overheating and refrigerant-related explosions, ensuring your cooling system remains safe and efficient during extreme heatwaves.

articles.description: The pilot was scheduled to operate a Kolkata-Delhi flight when he tested positive during a pre-flight breath analyser test, recording 0.004% blood alcohol content instead of zero per cent.

articles.title: SRMJEEE 2026 Phase 1 result today: Check result link, steps to download scorecard
articles.description: SRM Institute of Science and Technology is releasing SRMJEEE 2026 Phase 1 results today at 3 PM. Successful candidates can proceed to counselling for B.Tech admissions. The exam offers multiple phases for improved scores and flexibility. Phase 2 registration closes June 4, with exams from June 10-15. Phase 3 is scheduled for July 4-5.

articles.description: India depends on LNG imports to meet about half of its natural gas requirement, and about 60% of those imports came through the critical maritime chokepoint of the Strait of Hormuz, primarily from Qatar and the UAE.

Zoe Kravitz, Doja Cat, and Charli XCX were among the biggest highlights of the night, each delivering bold and artistic looks inspired by the theme 'Fashion Is Art.' From gothic elegance to futuristic glam and avant-garde silhouettes, the celebrities embraced creativity at its peak. The star-studded evening celebrated fashion as self-expression, with every arrival adding to the unforgettable glamour of the Met Gala 2026. Watch video!#MetGala2026 #ZoëKravitz #DojaCat

articles.title: Pilots’ body flags fuel-cut risk in Air India Ahmedabad crash probe
articles.description: In a recent detailed analysis, aviation experts highlight a proposed electrical failure scenario linked to lithium-ion batteries that may explain the Air India crash in Ahmedabad. This hypothesis, underpinned by Boeing's technical documents and historical data, posits that a battery malfunction could inadvertently sever fuel supply to both engines, challenging previous theories that pointed solely to pilot error.

articles.title: American Idol Reunion: Judges Paula Abdul and Randy Jackson back after 20 years
articles.description: Original American Idol judges Paula Abdul and Randy Jackson reunited after 20 years for a special 'Class of 2006' themed episode. While Simon Cowell was absent, Paula joined the current judging panel, and Randy mentored the top five finalists. Their return celebrated two decades of the show's iconic moments and talent discovery.

articles.title: PNB recruitment 2026: Registration ends tomorrow for Officer posts; check selection process and direct link to apply
articles.description: Punjab National Bank is recruiting for 30 Specialist Officer positions. The application deadline is May 5, 2026. Candidates need an engineering degree in Civil, Electrical, or Mechanical fields. The selection process involves a written exam, interview, and document verification. Interested individuals should apply online via the PNB website before the closing date.

articles.title: Power utilities told to boost revenue along with supply expansion
articles.description: Power utilities urged to enhance revenue while expanding electricity supply, ensuring efficient distribution and effective government scheme implementation.

articles.title: Alangulam election results 2026: DMK’s Paul Manoj Pandian wins by 7,798 votes
articles.description: DMK's Paul Manoj Pandian secured victory in the Alangulam Assembly election by a margin of 7,798 votes. The constituency, located in Tenkasi district, faces persistent issues including irrigation shortages, poor infrastructure, and limited healthcare and education facilities. Youth unemployment remains a significant concern for the underdeveloped region.

articles.title: Bahour election result 2026: DMK's R Senthil Kumar emerges as the winner with 10520 votes
articles.description: DMK's R Senthil Kumar has secured victory in the Bahour constituency, defeating T Thiagarajan by 2397 votes in the 2026 assembly elections. This agrarian region in southern Puducherry witnessed a remarkable 93.99% voter turnout by 7 pm. Bahour's electoral landscape has seen shifting loyalties, with Kumar's win marking a continuation of this trend.

articles.title: ‘Lotus Blooms In Bengal’: PM Modi, Amit Shah’s First Reaction After BJP’s Landslide Win
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi welcomed BJP’s massive lead in the West Bengal Assembly Elections, calling it a historic mandate and a victory of good governance. Home Minister Amit Shah said the results reflect people’s rejection of fear and appeasement politics. With BJP leading in over 195 seats, celebrations spread across Kolkata, beginning with jhalmuri gatherings and turning into a full Bengali feast at the Salt Lake headquarters. Party workers served fish curry, rice, and sweets to hundreds. The festive mood continues as counting remains underway, with the TMC trailing and final results yet to be officially declared.

articles.title: Upset Nvidia CEO Jensen Hunag to Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei: Get out of your ‘God complex’ and stop ...
articles.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang dismisses AI job loss predictions as 'ridiculous,' urging tech leaders to abandon their 'God complex.' He argues AI is a job creator, citing increased demand for software engineers and the Jevons paradox, where efficiency drives greater consumption and thus more jobs. Huang warns that discouraging technical careers could harm the US economy.

articles.title: PM Modi wears traditional Bengali dhoti and kurta as BJP clean sweeps West Bengal for first time
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi donned a traditional Bengali dhoti at BJP headquarters following the party's decisive victory in West Bengal. The BJP is set to form its first government, ending the TMC's 15-year rule with a significant majority. This win signifies a major political shift, with the BJP's vote share increasing substantially.

articles.title: Hardik Pandya misses out, Rohit Sharma comes back as MI opt to bowl first vs LSG - check full playing XI
articles.description: In a big blow to already-struggling MI, their full-time captain Hardik Pandya was not available for selection because he was "unwell". However, star batter Rohit Sharma made it into the side and returned after the hamstring injury.
